{{CargoRelic
|name=Lennon's Guitar
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=09-27
|source=* Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Leeku]] - [[Rare Rent]]
|description=On Sep 27, 1958, John Lennon purchased this legendary electric guitar in Hamburg, Germany.

From the beginning of the Beatles to the famous Shea stadium concert, this guitar accompanied John during his time as a member of the Beatles, also the happiest time of his life. It was not a guitar of a famous brand but it was the most cherished one for Lennon. It is said that this was the last guitar John Lennon played before the assassination.
|fame=34
|art=46
|fth=47
|civ=72
|tech=44
|ss1=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +30<br>Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +3<br>Avatar Score: 5,000/5,000
|ss2=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +40<br>Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +4<br>Avatar Score: 5,000/5,000
|ss3=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +50<br>Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +5<br>Avatar Score: 5,000/5,000
|ss4=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +70<br>Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +7<br>Avatar Score: 5,000/5,000
|ss5=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +90<br>Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +9<br>Avatar Score: 5,000/5,000
|ss7=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +90<br>Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail ATK +9<br>Avatar Score: 5,000/5,000<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, CIV Checks -10
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, 2x Green Card Drops +7.5%
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Avatar Score Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:CIV Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Time Chest Boost]]
[[Category:Mutant Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Avatar Score]]
